profile.education: Wabash College (BA, Economics, summa cum laude); Harvard Business School (MBA)
profile.background: Businessman who built a national auto parts distribution company; U.S. Senator (2019-2025); became 52nd governor in January 2025.

profile.education: United States Naval Academy (BS), University of Chicago (MBA), Indiana University Robert H. McKinney School of Law (JD)
profile.background: Marine Corps veteran and former intelligence officer. Management consultant at Heritage Foundation. Former U.S. House member. In Senate since 2017. Co-authored CHIPS and Science Act.

profile.education: Indiana University (BA Political Science), Grace College & Seminary (MBA)
profile.background: Navy Reserve veteran who served in Afghanistan. Former Indiana State Senator and U.S. House member. Worked in real estate and construction before entering politics.
